target:
Shinpei wants to save that girl,  
it seems he can't help it.

Huh, so in a situation like this,  
you're going to jump into my arms instead of hesitating?
(I can't afford to waste time anymore!)

Huh, so in a time like this,  
you're going to cling to me instead of hesitating?

No matter how embarrassing it is,  
I'll save Koyuba-san!

Shinpei…  
you're being a nuisance already.
Come on, you can't run anymore.

You're really persistent, Shinpei.  
Do you care that much about that girl?

Koyuba-san was trying so hard  
for this island!
I won't let you hurt her anymore!

Alright, stop talking.
I'm not listening anymore.

Just lie down and be still.
I'm going to kill that girl now.

Your legs are shaking and you can't move?
You really made Shinpei work so hard
to protect you.

What's this… stone?
You really have a bad sense of timing.

Probably that was a fatal wound.
If he dies, no one will be able to protect her.

Mio, let go!
Shinpei's going to die!

She's the one Shinpei risked his life to protect.
Until Shinpei dies, I'll keep her alive.

(You bastard…  
I can't see anything anymore…)

This is my final meal.  
Please enjoy it thoroughly…

(The entire shrine area is filled with  
a giant shadow…)
(A huge shadow spreads across the island…)
So it's those eyes, your manga…!
